allow: PowerShell($errors = $null; [System.Management.Automation.Language.Parser]::ParseFile\('C:\\Repos\\forge\\.claude\\skills\\forge-eval\\scripts\\analyse-run.ps1', [ref]$null, [ref]$errors\) | Out-Null; if \($errors\) { $errors | Format-List Message,Extent } else { 'parse OK' }; Get-Help 'C:\\Repos\\forge\\.claude\\skills\\forge-eval\\scripts\\analyse-run.ps1' | Select-Object Name, Syntax)

PowerShell($RUN='forge-dev-bash-20260423-174450-b232b741'; $TRACE="$env:USERPROFILE/.forge/runs/$RUN/trace.jsonl"; $lines = Get-Content $TRACE -First 30; $lines | ForEach-Object { try { $e = $_ | ConvertFrom-Json; if \($e.kind -eq 'tool_call'\) { $e | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 3 -Compress; '---' } elseif \($e.kind -eq 'llm_call'\) { "LLM: prompt=$\($e.promptTokens\) compl=$\($e.completionTokens\) dur=$\($e.durationMs\)"; '---' } } catch {} })

PowerShell($RUN='forge-dev-bash-20260423-174450-b232b741'; $TRACE="$env:USERPROFILE/.forge/runs/$RUN/trace.jsonl"; $ev = Get-Content $TRACE | ForEach-Object { try { $_ | ConvertFrom-Json } catch {} } | Where-Object { $_.kind -eq 'tool_call' -and $_.toolName -eq 'bash' }; Write-Host "bash calls: $\($ev.Count\)"; $u = $ev | Group-Object argsHash; Write-Host "unique argsHash: $\($u.Count\)"; Write-Host "max repeat: $\(\($u | Measure-Object -Property Count -Max\).Maximum\)"; $rep = $u | Where-Object Count -ge 2; Write-Host "hashes with >=2 calls: $\($rep.Count\)"; Write-Host ''; Write-Host 'Top 5 most-repeated:'; $rep | Sort-Object Count -Descending | Select-Object -First 5 | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.Name\): x$\($_.Count\)" })
